Argued and the Court modified its ruling as follows: DEFENDANT HENRY SHINEFIELD'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained based on the statute of limitations. The amended complaint alleges that as early as 2002, plaintiffs questioned the authenticity of the second offer but did nothing about their concerns. The amended complaint also fails to allege facts that establish a basis for a duty owed to plaintiffs or that the alleged wrongful act - backdating - caused plaintiffs any harm for plaintiffs already had agreed to purchase the subject property. Plaintiff is granted 14 days leave to amend. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.
